overview.label: Academy & Growth
headline: LEARN, IMPROVE,
AND PLAY WITH
CONFIDENCE
overview.paragraph1: At Its Padel, our coaching programmes are designed to help players develop their skills, build confidence, and enjoy the excitement of padel. Whether you are stepping onto the court for the first time or looking to refine your competitive game, our experienced coaching team provides structured training in a welcoming environment.
overview.paragraph2: Our academy offers programmes for adults, juniors, and beginners, with sessions focused on technique, strategy, and match play. Every session is designed to help players improve step by step while enjoying the social and energetic nature of padel.

academy.introDesc: We offer a range of coaching sessions to suit different playing levels and goals.

categories.title: Adult Coaching Academy
categories.description:
Our adult coaching sessions are designed to support players at different skill levels, from beginners learning the basics to advanced players looking to improve their competitive performance.
All coaching programmes are delivered in blocks of 6 weeks, allowing players to progressively develop their skills.

categories.title: Kids Padel Academy
categories.description:
Our Kids Padel Academy introduces young players to the sport through fun, structured coaching sessions that develop coordination, teamwork, and confidence.
All junior sessions are grouped by age and ability and run in 6-week blocks

categories.title: Mini & Junior Academy
categories.description:
Our Mini & Junior Academy provides flexible, affordable sessions for younger players to build strong fundamentals in a fun and energetic environment.
Sessions run throughout the week, including weekends, making it easy for families in East Kilbride and surrounding areas to access regular padel coaching

coaches.name: MARK OPENSHAW
coaches.title: HEAD COACH + TEAM GB REPRESENTATIVE

quote.heading: CHAMPIONSHIP MENTALITY
quote.text: Padel isn't just about the shot you make; it's about the space you control. We train you to see the court 3 seconds before the ball arrives.

description: Mark Openshaw is the Head Coach at Its Padel and a Team GB player with extensive experience in racquet sports and professional coaching.

Mark is passionate about helping players improve their skills while building confidence and enjoying the sport. His coaching focuses on technique, tactical awareness, and match performance, ensuring players continue to develop at every level.
Through structured training sessions and personalised guidance, Mark helps players unlock their potential and fully experience the excitement of padel.

coaches.name: JAMES GAUNT
coaches.title: ELITE COACH + STRATEGIST

quote.heading: TACTICAL PRECISION
quote.text: The difference between winning and losing often lies in court positioning. I build players who anticipate the point before the rally even begins.

description: James Gaunt brings unparalleled tactical expertise to Its Padel, combining years of top-tier competitive play with specialized analytic coaching.
His sessions deconstruct the game, focusing heavily on footwork, positioning, and decision-making under pressure.
Whether you are refining your bandeja or learning how to dictate the pace of the game, James provides the elite strategic perspective needed to level up your performance.

coaches.name: NICOLA MACINNES
coaches.title: SENIOR COACH + PLAYER DEVELOPMENT

quote.heading: STRUCTURAL FOUNDATION
quote.text: Power is nothing without consistency. We focus on building unshakeable habits so that your baseline game never cracks under pressure.

description: Nicola Macinnes is an expert in player progression, specializing in transforming intermediate talents into highly competitive tournament players.
With a holistic approach to athletic development, Nicola focuses on biomechanics and shot consistency, ensuring every movement on the court is efficient and powerful.
Her philosophy is built on creating an unshakeable foundation, allowing amateur players to confidently transition into advanced competitive play.

playtomic.subtitle: MOBILE FIRST PERFORMANCE
playtomic.headline: BOOK YOUR COURT NOW ON THE APP
playtomic.paragraph: Download the Playtomic app for seamless booking, player matchmaking, and real-time court availability at all Its Padel locations.
